title: BoltTowny
description: Bolt add-on providing integration support with Towny
body:
[Bolt](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bolt) add-on providing integration support with [Towny](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/towny-advanced.72694/).

**Features**
- town access type: Allow members of a Towny town to access a protection
- automatically remove protections from town plots that are unclaimed, cleared, or ruined

**Configuration**
- To enable and use the town access type, add `town` to the list of sources in your Bolt config!
